description: Operator-defined display layer for KAMI rendering. One record per logical layer that overlays the base map (e.g., 'tokyo-real-estate-heatmap', 'jp-seismic-7day'). The layer references a source DID and a MapLibre style spec. Per ADR-2605231400 + maps MIGRATION-TODO Phase 1 (Tier A).

sourceDid.description: Source DID this layer derives from (matches an com.etzhayyim.maps.source record).

kind.description: Render kind — drives the KAMI shader path.

zoomMin.description: Minimum zoom level at which the layer is visible.

zoomMax.description: Maximum zoom level at which the layer is visible.

styleSpec.description: MapLibre style spec object for the layer (paint, layout, filter). Free-form to avoid lockstep with MapLibre version.

labelCoordinatorDid.description: Optional reference to the KAMI layer coordinator that hosts this display layer (com.etzhayyim.maps.layerCoordinator).

supersedesLayerId.description: If this layer revises an earlier definition (style change, source swap), name the prior layerId. Old layer remains rkey-addressable for replay.
